response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer with extensive JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang experience, but the resume shows no embedded firmware, LAN-switch, Linux kernel modification, or network security work (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP). C programming experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, and there is no indication of Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement for the role.
strengths: Long track record as a senior engineer with strong testing/TDD discipline
Some historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Polyglot background showing ability to learn new languages and stacks
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed (hard requirement is native-level)
No embedded, Linux kernel, switch/firmware, or network-security domain experience
Primary C experience is brief and dated (2014-2015); recent work is web/cloud focused

key_factors.factor: Limited and dated C programming experience
